summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crystal Phase 2 features. CLI successfully rebranded to 'Crystal' with new architect and mcp commands working correctly. Frontend displays updated branding, tagline, and simplified content. Fixed minor spacing issue in hero tagline.

resolved_bugs.issue: Missing space between 'protects' and 'architecture' on mobile view
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Added space character after line break to ensure proper spacing

passed_tests: CLI: crystal --help shows 'Crystal' branding (not Crystal Guard) with all 8 commands: init, check, status, handoff, gates, report, architect, mcp
CLI: crystal architect tests/fixtures/good_project generates architecture.md with rules, stack info, and session instructions
CLI: crystal mcp serve --help shows MCP server options (transport, port)
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project returns A (100/100)
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/bad_project catches critical issues and returns F grade
CLI: crystal handoff tests/fixtures/good_project --output /tmp/test_handoff2.md generates valid handoff
Frontend: Hero shows 'Crystal' as main title (not 'Crystal Guard')
Frontend: Tagline shows 'Your AI coding buddy that protects architecture integrity and domain purity'
Frontend: Features section has 7 cards with simplified titles (Picks Up Where You Left Off, 15 Automatic Checks, etc.)
Frontend: Commands table shows 7 commands including crystal architect
Frontend: Footer says 'Build with AI. Ship with Crystal.'
Frontend: All navigation links work correctly
Frontend: Platform compatibility section displays all 8 platforms
Frontend: Terminal blocks display correctly with proper styling
